body.title: CLOSED: Remove uc_client admin wiring from Igor (web/ dir pending channel replacement)
body.result: uc_client admin wiring removed (register/stats/deregister); web_server send path kept — needs agent_datacenter channel replacement before web/ dir can be deleted; commit b2865377
body.description:
wild_igor/igor/web/ (server.py, utility_closet_client.py) is UC infrastructure that doesn't belong in Igor's cognition layer. After the UC wiring is confirmed working via agent_datacenter, remove this directory and clean up the import in main.py:68 and all call sites (register, start_stats_pusher, deregister, broadcast_activity).

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/web/ (delete), wild_igor/igor/main.py (remove uc_client calls)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; safeguards (main.py HIGH inertia — pre-approved for this migration)
**Scope boundary:** In scope: delete web/ directory, remove uc_client import and all call sites from main.py. Out of scope: Discord/network/ cleanup (separate ticket).
**Test plan:** Igor boots and runs normally without web/ directory. No ImportError. uc_client calls removed — stats no longer pushed to UC (UC side shows no agent attached, which is expected).
